description: Google Play Custom App Publishing API lets organizations and EMM providers create and publish private Android apps for managed Google Play. It is used to upload and publish custom apps tied to a Play developer account.
summary: One authenticated REST API surface: the Google Play Custom App Publishing API at playcustomapp.googleapis.com, using Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens from a service account with the androidpublisher scope.

surfaces.name: Google Play Custom App Publishing API
